title: cissus landuk
intro: Cissus landuk, also known as the Veld Grape or Cissus quadrangularis, is a perennial climber native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-arthritic effects. The health benefits of Cissus landuk include the potential to reduce joint pain and inflammation, improve bone density, and aid in weight management. Cissus landuk is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
